message:
fix: resolve clippy needless_collect and type_complexity warnings

- search/indexing.rs: eliminate intermediate ranked_ids Vec by chaining
  iterators directly (needless_collect)
- wezterm.rs: allow type_complexity on list_panes_cache field — the
  Arc<Mutex<Option<(Instant, Vec<PaneInfo>)>>> type is clear in context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -565,20 +565,17 @@ impl SearchIndex {
                 .then_with(|| left.2.cmp(&right.2))
         });
 
-        let ranked_ids: Vec<u64> = ranked
-            .into_iter()
-            .take(limit)
-            .map(|(_, _, id)| id)
-            .collect();
         let docs_by_id: HashMap<u64, IndexedDocument> = self
             .state
             .documents
             .iter()
             .cloned()
             .map(|doc| (doc.id, doc))
             .collect();
-        let output = ranked_ids
+        let output = ranked
             .into_iter()
+            .take(limit)
+            .map(|(_, _, id)| id)
             .filter_map(|id| docs_by_id.get(&id).cloned())
             .collect::<Vec<_>>();
